task_completion.description: Agent initiates a search for 'Cambridge' in the mapping application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar of the mapping software contains the text 'Cambridge' or a search results list is visible showing 'Cambridge, Massachusetts'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to Harvard Yard in Cambridge, Massachusetts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map is centered on the Harvard University campus or Harvard Yard. Visible landmarks may include Harvard Square, Memorial Church, or Widener Library. Coordinates on screen (if visible) are near 42.37°N, 71.12°W.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the placemark creation dialog and enters the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Properties', 'Edit Placemark', or 'Add Placemark' dialog is open. The 'Name' field is filled with 'Cambridge MA Research Point'.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the coordinates into the placemark description field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the placemark dialog, the 'Description' field contains text formatted as 'Coordinates: [lat], [lon]'. The values should be approximately 42.37 and -71.12.

task_completion.description: Agent saves or exports the placemark as a KML file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible showing the destination folder 'Documents' and filename 'cambridge_research.kml', or a file manager window confirms the file creation.

integrity.description: Agent uses the mapping application GUI rather than command-line tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical mapping application (e.g., Marble, Google Earth) rather than a terminal-only workflow.

integrity.description: Agent does not manually write the KML file using a text editor or echo command.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of a text editor writing XML/KML tags manually, and no terminal commands constructing the file content directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the application state naturally.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map view updates, dialogs appear/disappear, and the cursor interacts with specific UI elements relevant to the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Harvard Yard, Cambridge, MA, USA. Target Coordinates: Approx 42.3744°N, -71.1169°W. Valid Cambridge Bounds: Lat 42.350-42.404, Lon -71.160 to -71.070. Expected Placemark Name: 'Cambridge MA Research Point'. Expected Filename: 'cambridge_research.kml'.
